headline: Aon's General Counsel Sold $216,000 in Stock. The 14% Earnings Growth Matters More
summary: Darren Zeidel's $216,000 disposition was executed under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 plan, leaving him with 15,354 shares worth $5.52 million.
